eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LAW ENFORCEMENT WARNING for the following counties or areas: Quay, NM; at 01:14 PM ON FEB 25, 2026 Effective until 12:59 PM FEB 26, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Ft Sumner & De Baca County community please stay clear of the Billy the Kid Museum Area due to Law Enforcement activity.
